name: GEE Group Inc.
headquarters: Not specifically stated (operations in Atlanta, Dallas
summary: GEE Group Inc. is a provider of human resources solutions, primarily offering temporary and permanent staffing in professional services sectors across the United States. Through subsidiaries including SNI Companies, Access Data Consulting, Agile Resources, Paladin Consulting, and others, the company serves IT, engineering, accounting and finance, office support, and healthcare verticals. It operates via four virtual and 19 branch office locations near major U.S. cities, serving clients from small businesses to Fortune 1000 companies.
